pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Brotli + Memmap — 1.1138 BPB

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA forward and CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels with pre-computed LeakyReLU gradients plus Brotli compression and a memmap pipeline.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels keeping activations in-register
Pre-compute LeakyReLU gradients to eliminate branching and simplify the EVT epilogue
Brotli-11 artifact compression with memmap multi-shard + GPU-prefetch data pipeline
